classData.comment:
/**
 * A highly specialized Store natively optimized for the Native Edge Graph Database engine.
 * Extends the framework data collection layer by introducing generic reactive associative map indices,
 * reducing massive O(E) semantic topology loop traversals (GraphRAG mappings) to instantaneous O(1) retrievals.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.graph.Store
 * @extends Neo.data.Store
 */
classData.description: A highly specialized Store natively optimized for the Native Edge Graph Database engine. Extends the framework data collection layer by introducing generic reactive associative map indices, reducing massive O(E) semantic topology loop traversals (GraphRAG mappings) to instantaneous O(1) retrievals.
classData.name: Store

classData.comment:
/**
         * Reference to the parent Database coordinating this store.
         * @member {Object|Neo.ai.graph.Database|null} database_=null
         * @reactive
         */
classData.description: Reference to the parent Database coordinating this store.
classData.name: database_

classData.comment:
/**
         * Array of secondary index objects. Each object must have a `property` string.
         * Example: `[{property: 'source'}, {property: 'target'}]`
         * @member {Object[]|null} indices_=null
         * @reactive
         */
classData.description: Array of secondary index objects. Each object must have a property string. Example: [{property: 'source'}, {property: 'target'}]
classData.name: indices_

classData.comment:
/**
     * Map of secondary index maps for fast lookups.
     * me.indexMaps.get('source') -> Map<sourceValue, Set<Object>>
     */
classData.description: Map of secondary index maps for fast lookups. me.indexMaps.get('source') -> Map<sourceValue, Set
classData.name: indexMaps

classData.comment:
/**
     * Triggered after the indices config gets changed.
     * Re-initializes empty maps for each index and optionally seeds them.
     * @param {Object[]|null} value
     * @param {Object[]|null} oldValue
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Triggered after the indices config gets changed. Re-initializes empty maps for each index and optionally seeds them.
classData.name: afterSetIndices

classData.comment:
/**
     * Removes all items and clears the map. Overridden from Base.mjs to ensure indexMaps are flushed.
     * @param {Boolean} [reset=true]
     */
classData.description: Removes all items and clears the map. Overridden from Base.mjs to ensure indexMaps are flushed.
classData.name: clear

classData.comment:
/**
     * Clears filters, allItems, and the data map softly without alerting subscribers.
     * @param {Boolean} [reset=true]
     */
classData.description: Clears filters, allItems, and the data map softly without alerting subscribers.
classData.name: clearSilent

classData.comment:
/**
     * Extracts exact matching items synchronously from the GraphStore topography in O(1) mapping operations.
     * Assumes `property` exists dynamically within `indices_`.
     * @param {String} property
     * @param {*} value
     * @returns {Object[]}
     */
classData.description: Extracts exact matching items synchronously from the GraphStore topography in O(1) mapping operations. Assumes property exists dynamically within indices_.
classData.name: getByIndex

classData.comment:
/**
     * Prevents unintended wipe cascades by checking if this store is bound to a live production database.
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Prevents unintended wipe cascades by checking if this store is bound to a live production database.
classData.name: guardProductionWipe

classData.comment:
/**
     * Central topological funnel parsing addition mapped data vs removal tracked data for O(1) bindings.
     * @param {Number|null} index
     * @param {Number|Object[]} [removeCountOrToRemoveArray]
     * @param {Object|Object[]} [toAddArray]
     * @returns {Object} An object containing the addedItems & removedItems arrays
     */
classData.description: Central topological funnel parsing addition mapped data vs removal tracked data for O(1) bindings.

returns.description: An object containing the addedItems & removedItems arrays

classData.name: splice

classData.comment:
/**
     * Resolves all property map relationships via Neo Native Object or Document.get accessors.
     * @param {Object[]} [addedItems]
     * @param {Object[]} [removedItems]
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Resolves all property map relationships via Neo Native Object or Document.get accessors.
classData.name: updateIndexMaps
